title: Australia Coal Import Ban Update
summary:
Main
As we first discussed in a client note on Tuesday, a panamax vessel was fixed on Tuesday to ship coal from Australia to China. This fixture came as a very large surprise and it remains to be seen if the coal will actually be shipped to China. The vessel is scheduled to load at Dalrymple Bay between November 9th - 13th, and if it does actually unload its cargo in Jingtang, this would certainly be at odds with China maintaining a complete ban on coal imports from Australia.
